title: Grilled Fish Wrap
description: A delicious and healthy wrap filled with grilled fish, crunchy vegetables, and flavorful Vietnamese herbs.
instructions: Season the fish fillet with salt and pepper.
Grill the fish for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, toast the rice paper wraps on the grill for 1-2 minutes.
Assemble the wrap by placing the grilled fish in the center, followed by caramelized onions, cilantro leaves, crushed peanuts, and a squeeze of lime juice.
Dip the wrap in Sriracha sauce and serve immediately.
Serve with additional lime wedges and Sriracha sauce on the side.
Cut the wrap into halves or quarters, depending on serving size.
Garnish with additional cilantro leaves and peanuts, if desired.
